description: Get napkin rings after finishing table setting

cues.visual: Set of natural wood rings, light oak color

element3.detected_activity_raw: User just finished setting the full table

encoding_info.encoding_text: After you finish setting the table for the first time, go to the bedroom and get the napkin rings from the wardrobe, top drawer — the set with wooden rings. Place them on the napkins at each seat.

confirmation_question.question: What material are the napkin rings?

distractor_info.distractor_description: Set of metal napkin rings, silver polished, same drawer
